message:
audit: batches 480-481 — virtual_tcp FIXED + 12 more files SOUND

Batch 480:
- virtual_tcp.rs (876L) FIXED: unbounded buffer growth, now enforces
  backpressure with write_waker and partial-write semantics
- task_inspector.rs: fixed test compilation (create_task return type)

Batch 481 (12 files, ~18,969 lines, all SOUND):
- saga.rs, choreography/mod.rs, eprocess.rs — obligation lifecycle
- retry.rs, timeout.rs, join.rs — core combinators
- websocket server.rs, client.rs, frame.rs — WebSocket stack
- lyapunov.rs, graded.rs, symbol_cancel.rs — obligation/cancel

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
